2. Fix the code causing the failure
3. Run the failing check locally to verify it passes
4. Commit every change
5. Invoke the /rebase-and-submit skill for PAN-457 — this is an atomic task. Because verification already ran once (a PR exists), the skill will push your branch and run `pan review request PAN-457 -m "Fixed test"` for you. NEVER curl `/api/review/...` or any dashboard endpoint — `pan review request` is the only supported re-entry point.

Do NOT stop between steps. Do NOT stop after pushing. Do NOT stop until `pan review request` has completed successfully.
